title: Marriage and Relationships Counseling - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Marriage and Relationships Counseling 8 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Hispanic/Latino Community Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CHRISTIANS AS FAMILY ADVOCATES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers Christian faith-based mental health services, including counseling for trauma, adjustment, anger, domestic violence, parenting, marriage, depression, and anxiety; individual and group therapy for children, teens, and adults; and filial, play, and neurofeedback therapy including EEG Cygnet and IASIS microcurrent transcranial. Safe and Sound In protocol (SSP) providers. Provides intervention services to batterers and support to survivors, as well as therapeutic services for children and youth who have been impacted by divorce and/or domestic violence. Offers supervised visitation and parenting classes. 921 Country Club Road Suite 222 Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted, but cannot work with sex offender population Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday 9am-6pm, Wednesday 9:15am-5pm (541) 686-6000 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EMERGENCE EMERGENCE ODYSSEY ODYSSEY COMMUNITY COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outpatient mental health counseling around topics such as addiction, PTSD, grief and loss, and anxiety and mood disorders. Individuals will have an assessment prior to beginning services. 2149 Centennial Plaza Suite 4 Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Intake: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Counseling sessions: Varies by service Email (541) 741-7107 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ENFOQUE DE LA FAMILIA COUNSELING CENTER COUNSELING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides culturally-specific counseling with a focus on the Hispanic and Latino community for substance use, anger management, and/or domestic violence. Services are provided through group classes, family, individual, or marriage counseling, one-on-one problem-solving, and family activities. 205 SE 3rd Street Suite 200 Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Counseling: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Groups and classes: vary on weekday evenings (503) 681-4870 Get Directions More Details LEWIS AND CLARK COMMUNITY COUNSELING CENTER LEWIS & CLARK COMMUNITY COUNSELING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers individual, couples, family, and group counseling and therapy for people of all ages facing mental health, addiction, and relationship challenges. Offers treatment for individuals and families dealing with problematic gambling behaviors. All therapeutic services are strictly confidential. The Center is not a crisis intervention facility and does not provide medication management, but appropriate referrals will be given. 4445 SW Barbur Boulevard Suites 107, 205 Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-9pm, Saturday 10am-3pm Email (503) 768-6320 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTHWEST CATHOLIC COUNSELING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers counseling regardless of faith or finances. Services include counseling, classes, and workshop for individuals, couples, and families. Services focus on issues such as anxiety, grief, depression, trauma, sexuality, conflicted relationships, and stress. 8383 NE Sandy Boulevard Suite 205 Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-6pm, Friday 9am-4pm; other times by appointment Email (503) 253-0964 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PORTLAND THERAPY PROJECT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health services including individual, couples, group, and gender-affirming counseling, with a focus on trauma, body-centered work, and LGBTQ2+ support. Offers letters of readiness for gender-affirming surgeries in accordance with World Professional Association for Transgender Health (WPATH) standards. 825 NE 20th Avenue Suite 250 Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-6pm Email (503) 917-5737 Get Directions Visit Website More Details RETURNING VETERANS PROJECT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides confidential mental and physical health services through volunteer health providers. Traditional and non-traditional services may be available. Eligibility: Veterans, Service Members, including National Guard and Reserve personnel, and Military Family members (including spouses/partners, children, parents, grandparents, and siblings directly impacted by military service). Hours: Varies Email (503) 954-2259 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WASHINGTON COUNTY JUVENILE DEPARTMENT CONCILIATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides court-mandated and voluntary mediation services to assist couples in reaching an agreement about custody and parenting time before a court hearing. Also offers co-parenting education and counseling. 222 N 1st Avenue Hillsboro, OR 97124 Eligibility: -Court mandated Mediation and Parent Education: Parties with minor children who have a pending domestic relations case in Washington County -Voluntary Mediation: Parties with minor children who do not have a pending domestic relations case in Washington County -All other services: Parties with minor children Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 846-3428 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CHRISTIANS AS FAMILY ADVOCATES CHRISTIANS AS FAMILY ADVOCATES EMERGENCE ODYSSEY COMMUNITY COUNSELING ENFOQUE DE LA FAMILIA COUNSELING CENTER COUNSELING CENTER LEWIS AND CLARK COMMUNITY COUNSELING CENTER LEWIS & CLARK COMMUNITY COUNSELING CENTER NORTHWEST CATHOLIC COUNSELING CENTER NORTHWEST CATHOLIC COUNSELING CENTER PORTLAND THERAPY PROJECT PORTLAND THERAPY PROJECT WASHINGTON COUNTY JUVENILE DEPARTMENT CONCILIATION SERVICES
